Termeni esențiali pentru fondatori și st: Essential terms for founders and startups: TRL, grant, equity, consortium, EIC, SBIR, MVP, PMF, CAC, LTV, burn rate, runway, cap table, due diligence and 150+ more definitions explained simply.
Nu știi ce program ți se potrivește?: Don't know which program is right for you?
Testezi două variante de landing page pe: You test two landing page variations for a grant and see which one generates more registrations.
Google for Startups Accelerator, Techcel: Google for Startups Accelerator, Techcelerator, Upcelerator.
Momentul în care un utilizator nou înțel: The moment when a new user understands the value of the product and takes the first important action.
În eligibil.org, activation poate fi mom: In eligible.org, activation can be the moment when the user uploads the pitch deck and receives the first eligibility score.
They appear in pre-seed or seed rounds.
Pitch deck, video pitch, whitepaper, bus: Pitch deck, video pitch, whitepaper, business plan, website, one-pager, financial model, impact report.
Business to Business. Model în care star: Business to Business. Model in which the startup sells products or services to other companies.
Software pentru companii, platforme de H: Enterprise software, HR platforms, cybersecurity tools, industrial automation solutions.
Business to Consumer. Model în care star: Business to Consumer. Model in which the startup sells directly to individual consumers.
Aplicații mobile, marketplace-uri pentru: Mobile applications, consumer marketplaces, educational products, health apps.
EIC Accelerator poate combina grant cu i: EIC Accelerator can combine grant with optional equity investment.
Dacă startupul cheltuie €15.000 pe lună,: If the startup spends €15,000 per month, the burn rate is €15,000/month.
Modul prin care startupul creează, livre: The way the startup creates, delivers and captures value.
Abonament SaaS, comision, marketplace fe: SaaS subscription, commission, marketplace fee, license, usage-based pricing, services, freemium, hardware plus software.
Investiție VC, angel investment, unele a: VC investment, angel investment, some accelerators.
Granturi, premii, vouchere, cloud credit: Grants, awards, vouchers, cloud credits, research contracts, some non-equity accelerators.
Perioada în care startupul poate funcțio: The period during which the startup can operate with available money before running out of capital.
Dacă startupul are €120.000 și cheltuie: If the startup has €120,000 and spends €20,000 per month, the runway is 6 months.
AWS credits, Google Cloud credits, Micro: AWS credits, Google Cloud credits, Microsoft Azure credits.
Programul finanțează 70%, iar startupul: The program finances 70%, and the startup must cover 30%.
Program competitiv unde startupurile apl: Competitive program where startups apply, are evaluated and can receive awards, grants, visibility, mentoring or access to investors.
Avantajul care face startupul greu de co: The advantage that makes the startup difficult to copy.
Tehnologie proprie, date exclusive, dist: Proprietary technology, exclusive data, unique distribution, IP, brand, network, lower costs, strategic partnerships.
Un proiect Horizon Europe poate cere min: A Horizon Europe project may require a minimum of 3 partners from 3 different countries.
Procentul utilizatorilor care fac o acți: The percentage of users who take a desired action.
Din 1.000 de vizitatori, 50 creează cont: Out of 1,000 visitors, 50 create accounts. Conversion rate = 5%.
Expenses directly related to the project.
Salarii pentru echipa de proiect, echipa: Salaries for the project team, equipment, materials, subcontracting, technical services, testing, prototyping.
Cheltuieli generale care susțin proiectu: Overhead expenses that support the project but cannot be directly attributed to an activity.
Chirie, utilități, administrație, contab: Rent, utilities, administration, accounting, general management.
Procesul de discuții cu potențiali clien: The process of discussing with potential customers to understand their problem, need, behavior, budget, and willingness to pay.
Spațiu organizat cu documentele importan: Organized space with important startup documents, used for investors, grants, accelerators or due diligence.
Pitch deck, acte juridice, cap table, fi: Pitch deck, legal documents, capital tables, finances, contracts, IP, roadmap, technical documents, reports, internal policies.
AI avansat, biotech, robotics, quantum,: Advanced AI, biotech, robotics, quantum, new materials, hardware, space, climate tech, semiconductors.
Rezultat concret pe care un proiect treb: Concrete result that a project must deliver to the funder.
Raport tehnic, prototip, studiu de piață: Technical report, prototype, market study, demonstrable software, exploitation plan, impact report.
Eveniment la finalul unui accelerator un: Event at the end of an accelerator where startups present to investors, partners, and the community.
Discuție inițială cu un potențial client: Initial discussion with a potential client, partner, investor, accelerator or funder to understand needs and fit.
Modul prin care produsul ajunge la clien: The way the product reaches customers.
Sales direct, SEO, marketplace, partener: Direct sales, SEO, marketplace, partnerships, communities, app stores, resellers, integrators.
Startup aflat la început, de obicei cu M: Startup in its early stages, usually with MVP, first validations, small team, and initial traction.
Potrivit pentru startupuri cu TRL avansa: Suitable for startups with advanced TRL, typically TRL 6–8.
Momentul în care fondatorii sau investit: The point at which founders or investors sell their stake, usually through an acquisition, merger, or public listing.
Bani oferiți de investitori, fonduri VC,: Money provided by investors, VC funds, angel investors, companies, private accelerators, family offices or strategic partners.
Model în care produsul are o versiune gr: Model in which the product has a free version and a paid one with advanced features.
Analiză care arată diferența dintre star: Analysis that shows the difference between the current state of the startup and the requirements of a program.
Startupul are TRL 4, dar programul cere: The startup has TRL 4, but the program requires TRL 6. Gap analysis shows what experiments, validations, or documents are missing.
Grant unde mai multe organizații aplică: Grant where several organizations apply together in a consortium.
Etapa în care startupul scalează după ce: The stage in which the startup scales after validating the product, market, and business model.
Testare rapidă de tactici de creștere pe: Rapid testing of growth tactics to find effective acquisition, activation, retention or referral channels.
Document care explică rezultatele și efe: Document that explains the results and impacts of a project, including indicators, outcomes, beneficiaries, and changes produced.
Program care ajută ideile sau startupuri: Program that helps very early ideas or startups take shape through mentorship, training, space, community, and operational support.
Indicator principal care arată sănătatea: Main indicator showing the health of the startup.
MRR, ARR, churn, retention, CAC, LTV, ac: MRR, ARR, churn, retention, CAC, LTV, active users, gross margin.
Număr de utilizatori, venit lunar, cost: Number of users, monthly revenue, customer acquisition cost, emission reduction, validated prototype, number of partners.
Pagină web construită pentru o acțiune c: Web page built for a clear action: sign up, demo request, waitlist, download, application or purchase.
Model de business care conectează două s: Business model that connects two or more groups of users.
Vânzători și cumpărători, freelanceri și: Sellers and buyers, freelancers and clients, startups and funders.
Rezultat important care trebuie atins în: Important result to be achieved in a project.
Prototip funcțional, test pilot, primii: Functional prototype, pilot test, first 100 customers, certification, MVP launch, obtaining technical approval.
Avantaj defensibil care protejează start: Defensible advantage that protects the startup from competitors.
IP, date exclusive, efecte de rețea, cos: IP, exclusive data, network effects, high switching costs, brand, unique distribution.
Situație în care produsul devine mai val: Situation where the product becomes more valuable as more people use it.
Un marketplace devine mai valoros când a: A marketplace becomes more valuable when it has more sellers and buyers.
Finanțare care nu reduce procentul dețin: Financing that does not reduce the percentage owned by the founders in the company.
Granturi, premii, vouchere, credite clou: Grants, prizes, vouchers, cloud credits, technical support, non-equity mentoring.
Proces de vânzare în care startupul cont: Sales process in which the startup actively contacts potential customers via email, LinkedIn, phone or events.
Perioada necesară pentru a recupera cost: The period required to recover the cost of acquiring a customer.
Dacă un client costă €300 să fie achiziț: If a customer costs €300 to acquire and generates €100 in monthly margin, the payback period is 3 months.
Etapă ulterioară care finanțează dezvolt: Subsequent stage that funds technology development, advanced prototyping and readiness for commercialization.
Etapă de comercializare, de obicei fără: Commercialization stage, usually without a direct SBIR grant, but with access to contracts, customers, public procurement or private funding.
Schimbare importantă de strategie, piață: Important change in strategy, market, product or business model after validations or feedback.
Stadiu foarte timpuriu al startupului, d: Very early stage of the startup, usually before significant revenue or before a mature product.
Abonament, freemium, usage-based, per us: Subscription, freemium, usage-based, per user, per seat, enterprise license, commission.
Intangible assets created by the startup.
Brevete, software, algoritmi, design, kn: Patents, software, algorithms, design, know-how, trademarks, technical documentation.
Versiune demonstrativă a produsului, fol: Demo version of the product, used for testing, validation or presentation.
Proces de potrivire între startup, cerce: Matching process between startups, researchers, institutes, universities or relevant consortia for R&D grants.
Modul concret prin care startupul genere: The concrete way in which the startup generates revenue.
Abonamente, licențe, comisioane, tranzac: Subscriptions, licenses, commissions, transactions, services, advertising, usage-based billing.
Plan de dezvoltare pentru produs, busine: Development plan for product, business, technology or financing.
Program care acceptă aplicații continuu,: Program that accepts applications continuously, without a single fixed deadline.
Procesul prin care un potențial client a: The process by which a potential customer gets from first contact to purchase.
Lead, qualified lead, demo, proposal, ne: Lead, qualified lead, demo, proposal, negotiation, closed won.
Partea din TAM pe care startupul o poate: The portion of the TAM that the startup can realistically serve with the current product and model.
Companie care a trecut de etapa startup: Company that has passed the startup stage and is growing rapidly, with more mature revenues, team, and processes.
Stadiu de finanțare după pre-seed, când: Post-pre-seed funding stage, when the startup usually has MVP, initial validation, customers or traction.
Rundă de finanțare pentru startupuri afl: Funding round for early-stage startups, usually after MVP and initial validation.
Small and Medium-sized Enterprise. Echiv: Small and Medium-sized Enterprise. The English equivalent of SME.
Partea din SAM pe care startupul o poate: The portion of SAM that the startup can realistically earn in a defined period.
Lansare limitată a produsului către un g: Limited product release to a small group of users before the official launch.
Rescrie pitch deck, pregătește buget, ca: Rewrite pitch deck, prepare budget, look for partner, increase TRL, add LOI, apply to accelerator.
Setul de tehnologii folosite pentru cons: The set of technologies used to build the product.
Frontend, backend, baze de date, cloud,: Frontend, backend, databases, cloud, AI models, analytics, payment systems.
Document care descrie termenii principal: Document describing the main terms of an investment: amount, valuation, equity, investor rights, conditions, options and protection mechanisms.
Dovezi că startupul are validare în piaț: Prove that the startup has market validation.
Utilizatori, venituri, clienți plătitori: Users, revenue, paying customers, partnerships, LOIs, monthly growth, active pilots, good retention.
Vânzarea unui plan mai scump sau a unor: Upselling a more expensive plan or additional features to an existing customer.
Model de preț în care clientul plătește: Pricing model where the customer pays based on usage.
Per API call, per GB, per tranzacție, pe: Per API call, per GB, per transaction, per analysis, per document processed.
Procesul prin care verifici că problema,: The process by which you verify that the problem, solution, market or business model is real.
Interviuri cu clienți, pilot, LOI, vânză: Customer interviews, pilot, LOI, sales, waitlist, price test.
Startup finanțat de investitori de tip v: Startup funded by venture capital investors.
Formă de finanțare sau suport care poate: Form of funding or support that can be used for specific services.
Voucher pentru digitalizare, consultanță: Voucher for digitalization, consulting, cloud, IP, research or prototyping.
Bloc de activități într-un proiect finan: Block of activities in a funded project, with objectives, deliverables, budget, timeline and responsibilities.
WP1 — Management, WP2 — Cercetare, WP3 —: WP1 — Management, WP2 — Research, WP3 — Prototyping, WP4 — Validation, WP5 — Dissemination.
